existing_features.title: Audit and fix the WebcamFeed component's hand tracking initialization: ensure MediaPipe Hands loads correctly, the camera feed starts properly, and gesture detection events fire and propagate to the audio player without errors.

Audit and fix the useAudioPlayer hook to ensure piano sample files load successfully for the full C4–C6 range (25 keys). If sample files fail to load, the fallback oscillator synthesis must activate automatically so notes always play.

Audit and fix the gesture recognition utility (gestureRecognition.ts) to ensure landmark-to-note mapping works correctly for all 25 keys (C4–C6). Verify that finger extension detection thresholds produce reliable note triggering for typical hand positions in front of a webcam.

Audit and fix the GesturePiano component to ensure the webcam feed, piano keyboard, and volume control render correctly in the responsive grid layout, and that active note state updates are reflected visually on the PianoKeyboard component in real time.
